"'''The Empire's Finest: Who's Who in the Imperial Military'''" was an article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 96|''Star Wars Insider'' 96]]. Written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Abel G. Peña]], it covered the top ten [[Imperial officer/Legends|officers]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], with small biographies detailing their appearances in various ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Timeline of media|media]].

{{Magazine-stub|article}}
